name: dejaviewed
description: Turn your saved posts and bookmarks from Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, Pinterest, and browser bookmarks into a searchable, curated dark-mode catalog site. Full pipeline: scrape → classify → tier → extract links → thumbnails → deep-dive guides → render static HTML.
author: Gabicus

skills.name: dejaviewed
skills.description: Turn saved posts and bookmarks from any platform into a searchable catalog site
